coreIssue: CCarl, as a UX Lead Web Designer, has been consistently late to meetings, which may indicate underlying issues related to time management or workload. This bi-weekly check-in provides an opportunity to address punctuality, set clear expectations, and explore any support they might need from you. It's also essential to gauge their current motivation and stress levels, as this can impact their performance and engagement. Understanding these factors can help you provide the right support and adjustments to improve their overall effectiveness.
openingQuestion: CCarl, I've noticed you've been late to our meetings recently; could you share what's been happening around your schedule?
listenFor: whether they acknowledge the lateness issue
if they mention workload as a contributing factor
whether they express any feelings of being overwhelmed
avoid: do not assume they are unmotivated
do not focus solely on the lateness without exploring underlying causes
goodOutcome: You have a clearer understanding of CCarl's challenges with punctuality and any underlying issues.
suggestedAction: Discuss and agree on a strategy to improve meeting punctuality, such as adjusting meeting times or setting reminders.
